creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
On Thu, 10 Aug 2006 15:01:44 +0800
Rong-En Fan <rafan@freebsd.org> mentioned:

> On Wed, Aug 09, 2006 at 11:14:13PM +0600, Stanislav Sedov wrote:
> > >Description:
> > - Install documentation
> > - Update to 0.0.24
> >=20
> > Copy of this message was sent to (amdmi3@mail.ru).
>=20
> I have committed 0.0.24 update this morning. Could you
> please generate a new diff?=20
>

New diff:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------=
------
--- /usr/ports/textproc/uncrustify/1.diff	Thu Jan  1 05:00:00 1970
+++ /var/tmp/moved/uncrustify/1.diff	Fri Aug 11 21:56:55 2006
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+=3D=3D=3D> Generating patch
diff -ruN --exclude=3DCVS /usr/ports/textproc/uncrustify/Makefile /var/tmp/=
moved/uncrustify/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/textproc/uncrustify/Makefile	Thu Aug 10 09:32:32 2006
+++ /var/tmp/moved/uncrustify/Makefile	Fri Aug 11 21:56:44 2006
@@ -18,4 +18,22 @@
 GNU_CONFIGURE=3D	yes
 USE_GMAKE=3D	yes
=20
+.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+PORTDOCS=3D	*
+.endif
+
+# XXX: exists untill it will be committed to bsd.port.mk
+COPYTREE_SHARE=3D	${SH} -c '(${FIND} -d $$0 $$2 | ${CPIO} -dumpl $$1 >/dev=
/null \
+		2>&1) && \
+		${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} $$1 && \
+		${FIND} $$1/ -type d -exec ${CHMOD} 755 {} \; && \
+		${FIND} $$1/ -type f -exec ${CHMOD} ${SHAREMODE} {} \;' --
+
+post-install:
+
+.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@(cd ${WRKSRC}/documentation && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${DOCSDIR})
+.endif
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
---------------------------------------------------------------------------=
----

Thanks!

--=20
Stanislav Sedov         MBSD labs, Inc.         <ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru>
=F2=CF=D3=D3=C9=D1, =ED=CF=D3=CB=D7=C1         http://mbsd.msk.ru

If the facts don't fit the theory, change the facts.  -- A. Einstein
